subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast steadfastly adhered to the Covenant and Testament through a power from the Most Exalted Horizon! By God, the Truth, verily the people of the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت علی العهد و المیثاق بقوه من الافق الاعلی تالله الحق ان اهل الملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the concourse on high, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
